creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
I tried the new version.

I think my patch on

post-patch:
+.if defined(WITHOUT_X11)
+        ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/Terminal=.*$$/Terminal=true/'
${WRKSRC}/etc/emacs.desktop
+.endif

is still useful. I'm not sure whether we need that for
nextstep/GNUstep/Emacs.base/Resources/Emacs.desktop
, since I have no experience on GNUstep.

-- 
Zhihao Yuan, nickname lichray
The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
--------------------------------------------------
4BSD - http://lichray.tumblr.com/
